impact: This advances checkbox-45 by giving later Playwright automation a deterministic, testable drafting boundary: only redacted mocked fixtures are accepted, only reversible draft-edit fields can be planned, and live DevHub pages or consequential actions are refused before any browser interaction.
summary: Add a fixture-only DevHub form-drafting scaffold that validates mocked Playwright form states and returns a reversible draft action preview without browser execution.
target_task: Task checkbox-45: Add a Playwright form-drafting scaffold that can fill reversible draft fields only in mocked DevHub fixtures and produces an action preview instead of touching live DevHub.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
